ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent on which the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "government_form" TEXT /* Type of government */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the country's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the party was founded */,
  "ideology" TEXT /* Ideological stance of the party */,
  "leader" TEXT /* Name of the current leader of the party */,
  "foundation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the party's founding */,
  "key_issues" TEXT /* Key issues or platforms the party focuses on */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the party */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the party's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_tenure" (
  "tenure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tenure period */,
  "party_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the political party */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code for the country */,
  "year_first" INTEGER /* Year the party first came into power */,
  "year_last" INTEGER /* Year the party last held power */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Exact start date of the party's tenure in power */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Exact end date of the party's tenure in power */,
  "reason_for_leaving" TEXT /* Reason why the party left power */,
  "coalition_partners" TEXT /* List of coalition partners during the tenure */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the tenure information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_tenure_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_tenure_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code for the country where the election took place */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the election occurred */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., general, presidential) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Exact date of the election */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Percentage of eligible voters who participated in the election */,
  "total_votes_cast" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast */,
  "voting_system" TEXT /* Type of voting system used */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the election information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the election */,
  "party_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the political party */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes the party received */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of total votes the party received */,
  "seats_won" INTEGER /* Number of seats won by the party */,
  "incumbent" INTEGER /* Whether the party was an incumbent in the election */,
  "coalition_members" TEXT /* List of coalition members if the party formed a coalition */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the election results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., data retrieval, system update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "party_id_1" TEXT /* Identifier for the first political party */,
  "party_id_2" TEXT /* Identifier for the second political party */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., coalition, opposition) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship ended */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the relationship information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_relationships_party_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("party_id_2") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_relationships_party_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("party_id_1") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)
